nasb.text: across the Jordan, in the valley opposite Beth-peor, in the land of Sihon king of the Amorites who lived at Heshbon, whom Moses and the sons of Israel defeated when they came out from Egypt.

esv.text: beyond the Jordan in the valley opposite Beth-peor, in the land of Sihon the king of the Amorites, who lived at Heshbon, whom Moses and the people of Israel defeated when they came out of Egypt.

cnv.text: 地點是在約旦河東，伯．毘珥對面的谷中，就是住在希實本的亞摩利人的王西宏的地。這西宏是摩西和以色列人出埃及後擊殺的。

ccb.text: 当时他们在约旦河以东伯·毗珥对面的山谷，那里原属于希实本的亚摩利王西宏。摩西领以色列人离开埃及后消灭了西宏，
